style: Opaque dark fantasy ARPG inventory panel bitmap texture. No SVG, no vector look, no CSS gradient look, no white diagonal shine.

ontology.clause: ONTOLOGY ACTIVE: inventory UI must preserve dark fantasy ARPG material logic, readable item silhouettes, and compact equipment workflow.

prompt: Create one premium game-ready bitmap UI asset for a Diablo-like dark fantasy ARPG inventory panel. Aged blackened iron and carved dark stone frame, thin tarnished brass inlay, worn leather or smoked stone inner surface, subtle hand-painted texture, mature and restrained. The center must stay dark and quiet enough for item icons and equipment slots. No text, no labels, no letters, no numbers, no item icons, no characters, no HP/MP orbs, no buttons. Avoid MapleStory cute UI, flat vector, SVG style, CSS gradient, plastic gloss, neon, lens flare, white diagonal shine, bokeh, ornamental clutter, beige/cream palette, cartoon proportions. Opaque PNG, polished high-end game UI material, not a mockup screenshot.
acceptance: Looks like a high-quality painted bitmap game UI texture.
No text or symbols are embedded in the image.
No white diagonal shine or SVG-like flat gradient appears.
Center area remains readable for inventory content.
